{
  "claims": [
    "Kern County has some of the worst health outcomes in California.",
    "The proposed 'Grow Our Own' bill would require the University of California to construct a medical school in Kern County if certain funding thresholds are met.",
    "The San Joaquin Valley has the worst shortage of doctors and nurses in the state of California.",
    "The region also experiences some of the highest poverty rates and severe health disparities.",
    "Establishing a medical school in Kern County could increase access to healthcare in both rural and urban areas.",
    "Having more locally trained doctors and nurses could secure better health outcomes for residents in Kern County."
